mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ, A.SORDERNUM , A.SREGYN, A.SODR_CLOSE_TYPE_CD, A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM , A.SICISOFFICESCODE, A.SLACPSID, A.SSUBSCNESCODE, A.SSUBSCMSTIP , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTSEQ, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP, A.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS, A.SCONNALIAS, A.SMODELNAME, A.SCUSTNAME , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SRESULT_CD, A.SRESULT_MSG, A.SGATEWAYIP, A.SINSTALLADDRESS , A.SINSTALLROADADDRESS, A.SEX_PUSH_YN, A.NTICKET_ACT_SEQ, A.SCOMMENT , A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.SREPORT_OPINION, A.SODRHOPEDT, A.SODRREGDT , A.SOFFICECODE
mapper.select: SELECT now()
SELECT sSAID_Seq.NEXTVAL as SSAID FROM DUAL

SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A

SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A

SELECT
, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SOFFICENAME , A.SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM ( SELECT
, D.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , C.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , B.SIPMS_SVC_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST B , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD D
AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = B.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND A.SOFFICECODE = C.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = D.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+)
AND A.SEX_PUSH_YN <> 'O'
AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE IN (SELECT DISTINCT M.SLOFFICECODE FROM MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD M INNER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST T ON M.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = T.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND M.SLVL_CD = T.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
)
ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC ) A WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT, A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SNETMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR, A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT, A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.NCLASS_CNT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , H.SNEOSS_DD_YN , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , DECODE(COUNT(1),1,MAX(J.SLLNUM),0,'',MAX(J.SLLNUM)) AS SLLNUM , DECODE(COUNT(1),1,MAX(J.SSUBSCNEALIAS),0,'','·····') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , DECODE(COUNT(1),1,MAX(J.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION),0,'','·····') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , H.SNEOSS_DD_YN , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , DECODE(J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ,NULL,-1,J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ) AS NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , K.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , J.SICISOFFICESCODE , J.SOFFICECODE , J.SSUBSCNEALIAS , J.SSUBSCMSTIP , J.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , J.SCUSTNAME , J.SCONNALIAS , J.SLLNUM , J.SSAID , L.SIPMS_SVC_NM , CASE WHEN A.npriority > 5 THEN '감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK

, MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST J

AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+)

AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+)

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD DESC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.NBITMASK
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD DESC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.sql: , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD, D.SLVL_NM, E.SLVL_CD , E.SLVL_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM, H.SNEOSS_DD_YN
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
GROUP BY

SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0004','IA0005','IA0006') GROUP BY

SELECT
, (SELECT NWHOIS_SEQ FROM BIF.TB_WHOIS WHERE A.PIP_PREFIX = PIP_PREFIX AND A.nip_assign_mst_seq = TO_NUMBER(RIGHT(ssaid,12)) LIMIT 1) AS NWHOIS_SEQ , J.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
, MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST L WHERE 1=1
AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = L.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IN (SELECT NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST WHERE 1=1
AND NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (PIP_PREFIX >>= #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler} OR PIP_PREFIX <<= #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler} )
ORDER BY PIP_PREFIX DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
, MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST L WHERE 1=1
AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = L.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+) AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IN (SELECT NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST WHERE 1=1
AND NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (PIP_PREFIX >>= #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler} OR PIP_PREFIX <<= #{pipPrefix, javaType=Object, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kt.ipms.legacy.cmn.typehandler.CIDRTypeHandler} )
ORDER BY PIP_PREFIX DESC LIMIT 1 )

SELECT
, CASE WHEN A.NCNT > 3 THEN SQLJ.GETNTOA(TEXT(DECODE(FAMILY(INET(A.PIP_PREFIX)), 4, 'IPV4', 6, 'IPV6', 'IPV4'))||'|'||TO_CHAR(A.NFIRST_ADDR + 1)) ELSE A.SFIRST_ADDR END AS SFIRST_ADDR_GWIP , CASE WHEN A.NCNT > 3 THEN SQLJ.GETNTOA(TEXT(DECODE(FAMILY(INET(A.PIP_PREFIX)), 4, 'IPV4', 6, 'IPV6', 'IPV4'))||'|'||TO_CHAR(A.NLAST_ADDR - 1)) ELSE A.SLAST_ADDR END AS SLAST_ADDR_GWIP FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
1 = 1
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0004','IA0005','IA0006')
GROUP BY
ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX ASC

SELECT
, CASE WHEN A.NCNT > 3 THEN SQLJ.GETNTOA(TEXT(DECODE(FAMILY(INET(A.PIP_PREFIX)), 4, 'IPV4', 6, 'IPV6', 'IPV4'))||'|'||TO_CHAR(A.NFIRST_ADDR + 1)) ELSE A.SFIRST_ADDR END AS SFIRST_ADDR_GWIP , CASE WHEN A.NCNT > 3 THEN SQLJ.GETNTOA(TEXT(DECODE(FAMILY(INET(A.PIP_PREFIX)), 4, 'IPV4', 6, 'IPV6', 'IPV4'))||'|'||TO_CHAR(A.NLAST_ADDR - 1)) ELSE A.SLAST_ADDR END AS SLAST_ADDR_GWIP FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
1 = 1
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
GROUP BY
ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX ASC

SELECT
, J.SGATEWAYIP FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A
1 = 1 AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0004','IA0005','IA0006')
AND ( J.SSAID ILIKE '%' || #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR J.SLLNUM ILIKE '%' || #{sllnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' )
AND J.SLLNUM = #{sllnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND J.SSAID = #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY
, J.SGATEWAYIP ORDER BY A.PIP_PREFIX ASC

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM (
SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NBITMASK , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , CASE WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 9 THEN 'DHCP 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 10 THEN 'CONFIG 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK ,'' AS SIP_ASSIGN_SUB_NM , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , K.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , MAX(SSUBSCNEALIAS) AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , MAX(SMODELNAME) AS SMODELNAME , MAX(SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION) AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , MAX(SCONNALIAS) AS SCONNALIAS , L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , MAX(SLLNUM) AS SLLNUM , MAX(SSAID) AS SSAID , MAX(SCUSTNAME) AS SCUSTNAME , J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST J , MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD L , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD M , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD N WHERE 1=1
AND ( ( (A.nfirst_addr >= (SELECT(BIF.UF_Search_IP_to_NUMBER(#{sfirstAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y')) AS MM FROM DUAL) AND A.nlast_addr <= (SELECT(BIF.UF_Search_IP_to_NUMBER(#{sfirstAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N')) AS MM FROM DUAL)) ) OR ( (A.nfirst_addr <= (SELECT(BIF.UF_Search_IP_to_NUMBER(#{sfirstAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y')) AS MM FROM DUAL) AND A.nlast_addr >= (SELECT(BIF.UF_Search_IP_to_NUMBER(#{sfirstAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N')) AS MM FROM DUAL)) ) )
AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = #{sipVersionTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}
AND (
J.SLLNUM ILIKE '%' || #{sllnum, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
)
AND (
J.SSAID ILIKE '%' || #{ssaid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
)
AND (
J.SCONNALIAS ILIKE '%' || #{sconnAlias, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
)
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+) AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = L.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = M.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) GROUP BY A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT, A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SNETMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR, A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT, A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.NCLASS_CNT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD, D.SLVL_NM, E.SLVL_CD , E.SLVL_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , K.SLVL_NM, L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM, M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ )

SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ ,A.SCOMMENT , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.NBITMASK , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , CASE WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 9 THEN 'DHCP 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 10 THEN 'CONFIG 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK ,'' AS SIP_ASSIGN_SUB_NM , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , K.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , MAX(SSUBSCNEALIAS) AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , MAX(SMODELNAME) AS SMODELNAME , MAX(SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION) AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , MAX(SCONNALIAS) AS SCONNALIAS , L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , MAX(SLLNUM) AS SLLNUM , MAX(SSAID) AS SSAID , MAX(SCUSTNAME) AS SCUSTNAME FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST J , MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD L , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD M , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD N WHERE 1=1
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ = #{nipAllocMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} OR 0 =#{nipAllocMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT})
AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+) AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = L.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = M.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) GROUP BY A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ ,J.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ ,J.SCOMMENT, A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT, A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SNETMASK , A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR, A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT, A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.NCLASS_CNT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD, D.SLVL_NM, E.SLVL_CD , E.SLVL_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , K.SLVL_NM, L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM, M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM LIMIT 1

SELECT Seq AS RNUM , TIP AS SEARCHWRD , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NBITMASK , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , CASE WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 9 THEN 'DHCP 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 10 THEN 'CONFIG 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK ,'' AS SIP_ASSIGN_SUB_NM , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , K.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , MAX(SSUBSCNEALIAS) AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , MAX(SMODELNAME) AS SMODELNAME , MAX(SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION) AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , MAX(SCONNALIAS) AS SCONNALIAS , L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , MAX(SLLNUM) AS SLLNUM , MAX(SSAID) AS SSAID , MAX(SCUSTNAME) AS SCUSTNAME FROM ( SELECT Seq , TIP , NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , PIP_PREFIX , NBITMASK , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , NLVL_MST_SEQ , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , SEX_SVC_CD , SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , SIP_BLOCK , NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ , NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD , SNETMASK , SFIRST_ADDR, SLAST_ADDR, NFIRST_ADDR, NLAST_ADDR , SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , NCNT, NUSE_IP_CNT, NFREE_IP_CNT, NCLASS_CNT , SCOMMENT, DCREATE_DT, SCREATE_ID, DMODIFY_DT , SMODIFY_ID, NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , NPRIORITY FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS Seq , TIP, DECODE(BIF.UF_CHECK_IP(TIP), 'N',INET('0.0.0.0/32') , CIDR(INET(TIP))) AS MMA FROM( SELECT TRIM(unnest(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},CHR(9),','),CHR(10),','),' ',',') ,','))) AS TIP FROM DUAL ) MA WHERE TIP IS NOT NULL AND TIP !='' ) MM , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST TT WHERE MM.MMA <<= TT.pip_prefix(+) ) A , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST J , MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD L , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD M , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD N WHERE 1=1 AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ(+) AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+) AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = L.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = M.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) GROUP BY Seq, TIP, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SNETMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED , A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT, A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.NCLASS_CNT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD, D.SLVL_NM, E.SLVL_CD , E.SLVL_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , K.SLVL_NM, L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , NPRIORITY ORDER BY A.Seq

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM ( SELECT Seq AS RNUM , TIP AS SEARCHWRD , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SFIRST_ADDR , A.SLAST_ADDR , A.NBITMASK , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM AS SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , CASE WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 9 THEN 'DHCP 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) WHEN A.NPRIORITY = 10 THEN 'CONFIG 감사대상'::VARCHAR(10) ELSE '정상'::VARCHAR(10) END AS VALIDATIONCHECK ,'' AS SIP_ASSIGN_SUB_NM , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , K.SLVL_NM AS SICISOFFICESNAME , MAX(SSUBSCNEALIAS) AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , MAX(SMODELNAME) AS SMODELNAME , MAX(SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION) AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , MAX(SCONNALIAS) AS SCONNALIAS , L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , MAX(SLLNUM) AS SLLNUM , MAX(SSAID) AS SSAID , MAX(SCUSTNAME) AS SCUSTNAME , NPRIORITY FROM ( SELECT Seq , TIP , NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , PIP_PREFIX , NBITMASK , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , NLVL_MST_SEQ , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , SEX_SVC_CD , SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , SIP_BLOCK , NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ , NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD , SNETMASK , SFIRST_ADDR, SLAST_ADDR, NFIRST_ADDR, NLAST_ADDR , SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED, SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , NCNT, NUSE_IP_CNT, NFREE_IP_CNT, NCLASS_CNT , SCOMMENT, DCREATE_DT, SCREATE_ID, DMODIFY_DT , SMODIFY_ID, NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , NPRIORITY FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS Seq , TIP, DECODE(BIF.UF_CHECK_IP(TIP), 'N',INET('0.0.0.0/32') , CIDR(INET(TIP))) AS MMA FROM( SELECT TRIM(unnest(STRING_TO_ARRAY(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{searchWrd, jdbcType=VARCHAR},CHR(9),','),CHR(10),','),' ',',') ,','))) AS TIP FROM DUAL ) MA WHERE TIP IS NOT NULL AND TIP !='' ) MM , MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST TT WHERE MM.MMA <<= TT.pip_prefix(+) ) A , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F , MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H , MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD I , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST J , MST.TB_LVL_CD K , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD L , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD M , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD N WHERE 1=1 AND A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = J.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = C.NLVL_MST_SEQ(+) AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD(+) AND J.SOFFICECODE = K.SLVL_CD(+) AND LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = L.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) AND RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) = M.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD = N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) GROUP BY Seq, TIP, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.PIP_PREFIX ,A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_CNT , A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SNETMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NFIRST_ADDR , A.NLAST_ADDR , A.SFIRST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SLAST_ADDR_BINARY, A.SFIRST_IP_PREFERRED , A.SLAST_IP_PREFERRED , A.NCNT, A.NUSE_IP_CNT, A.NFREE_IP_CNT, A.NCLASS_CNT , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_ALLOC_EX_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD, D.SLVL_NM, E.SLVL_CD , E.SLVL_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, I.SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM , K.SLVL_NM, L.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , M.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, N.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , NPRIORITY )
mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ALLOC_NEOSS_SEQ, A.SORDERNUM, A.SREGYN, A.SODR_CLOSE_TYPE_CD , A.SSAID, A.SLLNUM, A.SICISOFFICESCODE, A.SLACPSID, A.SSUBSCNESCODE, A.SSUBSCMSTIP , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTSEQ, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION, A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTIP, A.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP, A.SSUBSCNEALIAS, A.SCONNALIAS , A.SMODELNAME, A.SCUSTNAME, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.PIP_PREFIX , A.SIP_BLOCK, A.NBITMASK, A.SFIRST_ADDR, A.SLAST_ADDR, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_SVC_CD, A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD, A.SRESULT_CD, A.SRESULT_MSG, A.SGATEWAYIP, A.SINSTALLADDRESS , A.SINSTALLROADADDRESS, A.SEX_PUSH_YN, A.NTICKET_ACT_SEQ, A.SODRHOPEDT, A.SODRREGDT, A.SREPORT_OPINION , A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT, A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID, A.SOFFICECODE

, B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD, E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM, F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM AS SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM , G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM AS SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, H.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, SPLIT_PART(J.SIPMS_SVC_NM, ' / ', 1) AS SIPMS_SVC_NM

A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_NM, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SLLNUM, A.SCUSTNAME, A.SSUBSCNEALIAS, A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ, A.SIPMS_SVC_NM , A.SVPN_TYPE_NM, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ

, MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD B, MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD F, MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD G , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD H, MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD I, MST.TB_LVL_BAS C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D, MST.TB_LVL_CD E, MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST J

AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = F.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = G.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = H.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = I.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND A.SICISOFFICESCODE = I.SLOFFICECODE(+) AND I.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND I.SLVL_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND C.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = J.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ(+)

sql.if: AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ IN (SELECT NIPMS_SVC_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST WHERE 1=1 AND SIPMS_SVC_NM ILIKE '%' || #{sipmsSvcNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')

choose.when:
ORDER BY SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

choose.when:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT
ASC
DESC
ASC
choose.otherwise:
ORDER BY A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC, A.PIP_PREFIX
ASC
DESC
ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ( SELECT , ROWNUM AS RNUM FROM (
SELECT
, 'KT' AS SVPN_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A
WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT
, '고객' AS SVPN_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_VPN A
WHERE 1=1
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE A.RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM (
SELECT
, 'KT' AS SVPN_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A
WHERE 1=1
UNION ALL
SELECT
, '고객' AS SVPN_TYPE_NM FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_VPN A
WHERE 1=1
)

SELECT
COALESCE(GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_NM, M.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM::TEXT) AS NAME , COALESCE(GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD, M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD::TEXT) AS CODE
DISTINCT M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS CODE , SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS NAME
FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD GM ON M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST SM on M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = SM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_SUB SS on SM.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = SS.NIPMS_SVC_MST_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV on SS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD WHERE 1=1
AND LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
AND GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_NM, M.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM::TEXT) , COALESCE(GM.SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD, M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD::TEXT)
ORDER BY CODE, NAME

SELECT CODE, NAME FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS CODE , SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS NAME FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD M , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST SM , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_SUB SS , MST.TB_LVL_MST LV WHERE 1=1 AND M.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = SM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) AND SM.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = SS.NIPMS_SVC_MST_SEQ(+) AND SS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+)
AND LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
UNION SELECT SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AS CODE , SASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS NAME FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD WHERE SASSIGN_tYPE_CD = 'SA0000' ) ORDER BY CODE, NAME

SELECT SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD AS CODE , SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_NM AS NAME , STRING_AGG(SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, ';') AS SUB_CODE_STR FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD WHERE 1=1
AND SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD IN
#{item}
GROUP BY SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_NM ORDER BY SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_GROUP_NM

select.if:
SELECT
FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST A
FROM MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST_VPN A
WHERE 1=1
AND A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ = #{nipAllocMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
LIMIT 1

mapper.select: SELECT A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , A.SEX_SVC_CD , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD , A.SUSE_TYPE_CD , B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST A , MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_SUB B WHERE A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = #{nipmsSvcSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = B.NIPMS_SVC_MST_SEQ
